title: apicra maxima
intro: Apicra maxima, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow and orange blooms. The medicinal properties of Apicra maxima include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Apicra maxima include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Apicra maxima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for their medicinal and therapeutic effects.
